source_excerpt: Our total revenues increased $32.2 billion or 4.7% and $32.9 billion or 5.1% for fiscal 2026 and 2025, respectively, when compared to the previous fiscal year.
notes: The claim states the increase was 6.7%, but the source clearly states it was 4.7% for fiscal 2026. The dollar amount ($32.2 billion) matches, but the percentage figure is materially wrong, making the claim unsupported.
